findings.description: PascalCase class name `SqlResultSet` is used in the update screen (更新画面の例) Action code example in s1 but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `SqlResultSet userInfo = component.selectUserInfo(form); ctx.setRequestScopedVar("W11AC03", userInfo.get(0));` — SqlResultSet is a key Nablarch API class used in the initial value setting pattern for update screens.
